arts.ttl: Como Make Bold Move for Barcelona’s Eric Garcia
arts.sum: Como's ambitious transfer strategy continues to make waves in Italian football, and fresh off the heels of securing Dele Alli on a free transfer, the Italian club have now set their sights on Barcelona defender Eric Garcia. This latest pursuit underscores Como's determination to not only secure Serie A survival but also to build a sustainable project blending experience with emerging talent. The post Como Make Bold Move for Barcelona’s Eric Garcia appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Barcelona on alert as Man City readying €100m offer for ace that Arsenal covet
arts.sum: Barcelona’s well documented financial problems are showing no signs of easing, and the Catalans are bracing themselves for a €100m bid from Man City for Raphinha. According to TeamTalk, the reigning Premier League champions are looking to do a deal for the Brazilian – who has 31 G/A this season (transfermarkt) – in the summer. […] The post Barcelona on alert as Man City readying €100m offer for ace that Arsenal covet appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Benfica: Champions League
arts.sum: Hansi Flick's Barcelona will be without Dani Olmo for the game vs. Benfica in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 10 Champions League talking points as Liverpool eye history and Jurgen Klopp wants revenge
arts.sum: The Champions League returns on Tuesday after more than a month, with Liverpool currently leading the way and Manchester City at risk of missing out on the knockout stages

arts.ttl: ‘My future is here’ - Ferran Torres shoots down AC Milan rumors
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Ferran Torres shot down rumors he could move to AC Milan ahead of Tuesday’s Champions League tie with Benfica . However, Ferran told a press conference he’s only thinking of Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Flick explains why Szczesny is one of the ‘best signings’ Barça have made
arts.sum: Szczesny has certainly more than delivered on and off the pitch, and it’s very impressive how he was able to come out of retirement, wait months for a chance to play, and look like he never missed a beat as soon as he made his first start. Flick went as far as to call him one of the best signings the club has made in recent years, praising Szczesny’s leadership as he helps a young squad navigate the ups and downs of a long season.
